creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
okay, adamw listed two PRs and dfilter was broken at the time meaning neither PR got a copy of the commit.

Okay, so I'm closing this PR then.
I think the license worry was way blown out of proportion, but portmgr isn't responding to me consistently on more important issues so I'm not going to increase the noise with license issues (the whole license topic is a problem they refuse to address)
